steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content: The equation is $k+21=63$. To get $k$ by itself, undo the added $21$ by subtracting $21$ from both sides.

steps.title: Compute the value
steps.content: After subtracting, the equation becomes $$k=63-21=42$$ The solution is $42$, which satisfies the original equation because $42+21=63$. The answer is B.
